results.text: Gleb Pugachyov - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. Throwing soul-crushing hits on the regular and violently fighting for inside positioning every chance he gets, Pugachyov projects to bring a significant intimidation factor at the NHL level.
